'''''Heroes in Hiding''''' is a children's pop-up book by [[Ken Steacy]] published by [[Golden Books]] in [[1996]].<ref name="Amazon" />

==Publisher's summary==
''R2-D2 and C-3PO must cross the city, avoiding the Imperial stormtroopers, to rejoin Luke Skywalker on the Millennium Falcon''<ref name="Amazon" />

==Plot summary==
The book detailing the adventures of the two [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] after they were sent outside of [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]].
